name: chr10q11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 10 q-arm pericentric flank (10q11.1-10q11.22), the q-side sub-centromeric LCR shoreline. Distally adjoins the 10q11.2 RET locus. Alpha-satellite (D10Z1), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline; distally adjacent to RET locus / MEN2.
